content_fingerprint: hugging face releases community guide on training multimodal embedding and reranker models hugging face has published a community authored guide walkthrough for training and fine tuning multimodal embedding and reranker models using the sentence transformers library extending the framework beyond text only use cases the guide authored by tom aarsen and published on april 16 2026 covers how to train and fine tune multimodal embedding models and reranker models within the sentence transformers ecosystem sentence transformers is widely used to produce dense vector representations of text for retr
